events.text: Measured rotor thickness is 26.67 mm against a stamped minimum of 28.0 mm — the rotor is below its discard specification. I wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: **fail**, high risk, worn condition, with the recommendation to replace the rotors (as an axle pair) rather than machine them, since no material remains above minimum.
